questions.question: Describe the role of a graphical user interface (GUI) in the interaction between a user and an operating system. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the benefits of GUI in user-system interaction

questions.question: Explain how a command-line interface (CLI) differs from a graphical user interface (GUI) in terms of interaction between a user and an operating system. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Compare and contrast CLI and GUI in terms of user-system interaction

questions.question: What is the purpose of a system prompt in a command-line interface (CLI)? (3 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the functionality of the system prompt
